reviews.text: Amazing food, the pasta was perfectly cooked and the sauce was rich and flavourful. Staff were attentive without being intrusive. Will definitely be back.
Waited 45 minutes for a table even with a reservation. The hostess was rude and dismissive when we asked for an update. Not acceptable for a place charging these prices.
Food was decent but nothing special. The main course arrived lukewarm and when we mentioned it the waiter just shrugged. Expected better for the price point.
Found this place on Google Maps and the photos looked great. The interior is stunning when you walk in. But the menu was confusing and the prices were not shown clearly online.
We had a family celebration here and the staff went above and beyond. They had a birthday cake ready without us asking and gave us a quiet corner table. Truly memorable evening.
Online reservation system is broken. I booked 2 weeks in advance and when I arrived they had no record of it. Had to wait an hour. The manager offered no apology or compensation.
The steak was cooked exactly as requested and the sides were generous. Wine list is impressive with good value options. Service was a bit slow at the start but picked up.
I have been coming here for 3 years and the quality has really dropped. The portions are smaller and prices are higher. The signature dish is not the same anymore.
Tried to call and make a reservation but nobody answered. Eventually booked through the website but the confirmation email never arrived. Stressful before we even got there.
Incredible dessert selection. The chocolate fondant was outstanding. Waitstaff knew the menu inside out and gave great recommendations. One of the best meals I have had this year.
Toilets were dirty and one cubicle was out of order. For a restaurant of this calibre that is unacceptable. Food was good but I kept thinking about the state of the bathrooms.
Great atmosphere on a Friday night, buzzy without being too loud. Cocktails were creative and reasonably priced. The sharing plates concept works well here.
Bill came with a service charge already added and it was not mentioned by our server. When I questioned it the manager was defensive. I would have tipped generously but this felt sneaky.
Gluten free options were clearly labelled and the kitchen took our allergy seriously. Server double-checked with the chef before bringing our food. Rare to feel this safe dining out.
Waited 25 minutes between starter and main. When the food finally arrived mine was cold. The restaurant was not even that busy. Poor kitchen coordination.
Lovely Sunday lunch. Roast was traditional and hearty. Kids menu was good value. Parking was easy. The kind of reliable neighbourhood restaurant you want on your doorstep.
Ordered the fish special and it was listed as market price on the menu. Was not told what that meant before ordering. The bill was a shock. Felt deliberately misleading.
The loyalty card they gave us last time was not honoured. Staff said the promotion had ended but we only got the card two months ago. No compensation offered. Feels like a bait and switch.
Lively spot with good energy. The tapas portions were fair and we ordered a lot without the bill becoming painful. Service was cheerful. Would come back for drinks and snacks.
Sent a complaint via their website contact form three weeks ago and still no response. This is the second time service has let us down. They clearly do not value returning customers.
